channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: HKUDS /ViMax | Python | N/A
item.description: "ViMax: Agentic Video Generation (Director, Screenwriter, Producer, and Video Generator All-in-One)"

item.title: microsoft /ai-agents-for-beginners | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents

item.title: frappe /erpnext | Python | N/A
item.description: Free and Open Source Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)

item.title: Alishahryar1 /free-claude-code | Python | N/A
item.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or discord like OpenClaw (voice supported)

item.title: Diolinux /PhotoGIMP | CSS | N/A
item.description: A Patch for GIMP 3+ for Photoshop Users

item.title: humanlayer /12-factor-agents | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: What are the principles we can use to build LLM-powered software that is actually good enough to put in the hands of production customers?

item.title: multica-ai /andrej-karpathy-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

item.title: colbymchenry /codegraph | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | Shell | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: rtk-ai /rtk | Rust | N/A
item.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

item.title: CloakHQ /CloakBrowser | Python | N/A
item.description: Stealth Chromium that passes every bot detection test. Drop-in Playwright replacement with source-level fingerprint patches. 30/30 tests passed.

item.title: rohitg00 /agentmemory | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: #1 Persistent memory for AI coding agents based on real-world benchmarks

item.title: anthropics /claude-plugins-official | Python | N/A
item.description: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: Imbad0202 /academic-research-skills | Python | N/A
item.description: Academic Research Skills for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize

item.title: tinyhumansai /openhuman | Rust | N/A
item.description: Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.
